author: gowtham0992
name: Learning Adapters on Random Linear Maps
blurb: First random-linear-maps submission. Attention and MLP weights are frozen random orthogonal matrices (regenerated from seed, 0 bytes in artifact). Only LoRA adapters (rank 32) trained and stored. 30M effective params, 5.19 MB artifact. Sliding window eval only. 8xH100 SXM, 4307 steps at 129ms/step.
